import pandas as pd


def load_users(path):
    return pd.read_csv(path, dtype={"user_id": int, "name": str, "email": str})


def load_transactions(path):
    df = pd.read_csv(path, dtype={
        "tx_id": int,
        "amount": float,
        "timestamp": "datetime64[ns]",
    })
    return df


def load_products(path):
    return pd.read_csv(path, dtype={"sku": str, "price": float}, index_col=0)
